name: Round Table
description: The Round Table is a potent symbol of Arthurian legend, representing equality, fellowship, and the pursuit of justice. Its circular design ensures that no one knight holds precedence over another, fostering a spirit of camaraderie and shared responsibility among Arthur's most valiant warriors. Legend attributes its creation to various sources, including Merlin, Uther Pendragon, and even King Leodegrance as part of Guinevere's dowry. The table served as the focal point for knightly gatherings, strategic planning, and the sharing of tales of bravery and adventure. It was not merely a piece of furniture but a sacred space where oaths were sworn, quests were launched, and the ideals of chivalry were upheld. The number of seats at the table varies in different accounts, ranging from 50 to over 150, each representing a knight of exceptional skill and unwavering loyalty. The most famous seat, the Siege Perilous, was reserved for the knight destined to achieve the Holy Grail, a quest that tested the mettle and moral fortitude of Arthur's knights. The Round Table's influence extended beyond Camelot, inspiring generations with its message of unity, honor, and the pursuit of a better world. Its legacy continues to resonate in contemporary culture, serving as a reminder of the enduring power of chivalry and the importance of collective action.
subtitle: Equality, Fellowship, Chivalry Embodied

keyMyths.title: The Siege Perilous
keyMyths.description: A seat reserved for the knight destined to find the Holy Grail. Only the purest knight could sit there without being consumed.

keyMyths.title: The Table's Creation
keyMyths.description: Accounts vary regarding the Round Table's origin. Some say Merlin created it, others that it was part of Guinevere's dowry.

sources.author: Sir Thomas Malory
sources.description: A comprehensive compilation of Arthurian legends.
sources.text: A comprehensive compilation of Arthurian legends.

sources.author: Chrétien de Troyes
sources.description: Early Arthurian romances featuring knights of the Round Table.
